findings.title: Unconditional closesocket on invalid socket handle
findings.rationale: The diff removed the guard check for socket_ != INVALID_SOCKET before calling closesocket. Windows API requires valid socket handle for closesocket; passing INVALID_SOCKET (typically -1) causes undefined behavior (crash or resource corruption).
findings.suggestion: Restore the socket validity check before closesocket call

evidence.ref: Windows API documentation: closesocket requires valid socket handle
